Clone, Rouge Veil No. 13 - Inspired by B.accarat R.ouge 540 Perfume For Women Men Unisex, Extrait de Parfum, Fragrance Perfume Spray, 1.7 Fl Oz (50ml)

PURE FRAGRANCE: In Top Note: Begin your sensory journey with a radiant fusion of Saffron and Jasmine. In Middle Note: Unfold a sophisticated blend of Amberwood, Ambergris, and Hedione that captivates with refined elegance. In Base Note: Conclude with a robust foundation of Fir Resin, Cedar, a touch of Sugar, Ambroxan, and Oakmoss, leaving a lasting impression.
INSPIRED BY B.accarat R.ouge 540: Our Rouge Veil 13 by Clone Of Perfume draws, encapsulating magnetic scent and seductive character. This fragrance is far more than just a scent-it is an immersive experience.
FINEST INGREDIENTS: Our formulation utilizes the most exquisite essences. At Clone Of Perfume, we commit to superior concentrations that impart Rouge Veil 13 with an authentic allure.
PERFUME FOR ALL: We believe that exceptional fragrances should be accessible to everyone. With Rouge Veil 13, Clone Of Perfume champions inclusivity by offering a premium eau de parfum at a price that welcomes all.
UNISEX APPEAL: This fragrance is suited for women while also proving to be an excellent choice for man. Its balanced composition caters gracefully to both masculine and feminine tastes, making it a truly versatile scent.
VEGAN AND PARABEN-FREE: Crafted in adherence to strict cosmetic safety standards, our fragrance is both sustainable and ethical. Rouge Veil 13 is vegan, free from parabens and phthalates, and designed to be entirely non-toxic and cruelty-free for guilt-free indulgence.

Manufacturer ‏ : ‎ The Clone LLC
ASIN ‏ : ‎ B0F24YB6L6

We often include links to buy products we use. As an Amazon Associate, I earn commissions from qualifying purchases. Thank you!
#ad
